auth.login_subtitle: Banye iji gaa n'ihu nweta ahụmịhe dị mma.
auth.register_subtitle: Nweta njem dị mma ma nwee nchekwa.
auth.or_continue_with: Ma ọ bụ gaa n'ihu site na
auth.agree_to_terms: Ekwenyere m na Usoro na Amụma Nzuzo niile
auth.invalid_phone: Biko tinye nọmba ekwentị ziri ezi.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Tinye nọmba ekwentị jikọtara na akaụntụ gị anyị ga-ezitere gị koodu tọgharịa.
auth.otp_subtitle: Tinye koodu OTP nọmba 6 ezigara gị.
auth.invalid_otp: Biko tinye koodu nọmba 6 ziri ezi.
auth.create_new_password_subtitle: Họrọ okwuntughe echekwara nke ị ga-echeta.
auth.password_too_short: Okwuntughe ga-enwerịrị opekata mpe mkpụrụ edemede 6.

profile_setup.role_selection_title: Kedu ka ị na-ezube iji Chauffly?
profile_setup.passenger_description: Nkwanye ugwu gị, nchekwa gị, na udo uche gị na mbụ.
profile_setup.driver_description: Kpọọ ụgbọala na nsọpụrụ, ọrụ ọkachamara, na ohere inweta ego dị elu.
profile_setup.corporate_description: Ịnyịnya ejiri nke ọma maka ndị otu gị na ndị ahịa.
profile_setup.ride_style_placeholder: Họrọ ụdị njem dabara na ọkwa nkwanye ugwu gị
profile_setup.accessibility_options_placeholder: Mee ka onye ọkwọ ụgbọala mara ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ enyemaka ọzọ
profile_setup.facial_verification_description: Maka nchekwa gị, anyị na-eji ịchọpụta ihu iji gosipụta na ọ bụ gị n'ezie n'oge ịwụlite na omume akaụntụ echekwara. A na-ezobe data ihu gị ma chekwaa ya n'ụzọ dị nchekwa.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_1: Jide ihu gị otu ugboro n'oge ntọala.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_2: Eji ya maka nyocha naanị anaghị ekekọrịta ya na ndị ọkwọ ụgbọala.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_3: Ị nwere ike gbanyụọ nke a oge ọ bụla na Ntọala.
profile_setup.facial_verification_success_description: E debanyela ihu gị n'ụzọ echekwara. Anyị ga-eji ya mee nyocha ngwa ngwa na nchekwa n'oge njem.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Nnọọ na chauffly
Gawa na Ntụkwasị Obi
onboarding.slide1_description: Nwee mmasị na ịnyịnya ọkwa, ndị ọkwọ ụgbọ ala a tụkwasịrị obi, na ahụmịhe njem e wuru gburugburu nkwanye ugwu na nchekwa.
onboarding.slide2_title: Ọmarịcha, Oge ọ bụla Ị Chọrọ Ya
onboarding.slide2_description: Họrọ site na Go, Plus, Luxe, ma ọ bụ Black — njem a haziri nke ọma maka oge ọ bụla, site na ozi kwa ụbọchị ruo njem ndị isi.
onboarding.slide3_title: Nchekwa Gị Bụ Ihe Kasị Mkpa Anyị
onboarding.slide3_description: Ndị ọkwọ ụgbọ ala enyochara, nyocha n'oge n'oge, nchọpụta ihu, na ikekọrịta ozugbo na-echekwa njem ọ bụla n'udo.
